title: Lead Investment Banker at United India Insurance Capital India

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at United India Insurance Capital India
jsonLd.description:
United India Insurance Capital India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Investment Banker at our Kanpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About United India Insurance Capital India:
United India Insurance Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with United India Insurance Capital India!
